# ErdalToprak.com

> This website is Erdal Toprak's personal website. It is built with Astro and deployed on a VPS.

## Pages

- [Home](https://erdaltoprak.com)
- [Blog](https://erdaltoprak.com/blog)
- [About](https://erdaltoprak.com/about)

## Articles

- [Setting up a local reverse proxy on Proxmox with Traefik and Cloudflare](https://erdaltoprak.com/blog/setting-up-a-local-reverse-proxy-on-proxmox-with-traefik-and-cloudflare)
- [Using venv, pyvenv, autoenv on macOS](https://erdaltoprak.com/blog/using-venv-pyvenv-autoenv-on-macOS)
- [AI Homelab - A guide into hardware to software considerations](https://erdaltoprak.com/blog/ai-homelab-a-guide-into-hardware-to-software-considerations)
- [Abstracting local development environments through containers](https://erdaltoprak.com/blog/abstracting-local-development-environments-through-containers)
- [Setting up macOS for development](https://erdaltoprak.com/blog/setting-up-macos-for-development)
- [Setting up Cloudflare Argo and Access on a Raspberry Pi](https://erdaltoprak.com/blog/setting-up-cloudflare-argo-access-on-a-raspberry-pi)
- [iCloud custom domain guide](https://erdaltoprak.com/blog/icloud-custom-domain-guide)
- [Hello World](https://erdaltoprak.com/blog/hello-world)
